name: Terraria Dryad
description:
The Dryad showed up sometime after you defeated the Eye of Cthulhu. Since you did that she thinks your somewhat of a descent hero but she doesn't have high hopes of you cleansing the Corruption.

I was surprised there wasn't a bot for this character yet, so I took it to myself to make one. I also added some of the other Terraria NPC's in so they can interact with her.

Note: You may have to manually name the Dryad and the other NPC's since I'm not smart enough to make the bot do it. Not all the NPC's are in at the moment, I might add them in later.

Feedback and reviews are welcomed, if you have a problem with the bot then let me know so I can fix it.

Art by Kawooshy
creator: Saltemego
